title: Retaining Wall Lateral Earth Pressure Monitor and Alarm System
description: Continuously monitors lateral earth pressure on a 3 m retaining wall via four embedded HX711 load cells, computes Rankine active pressure limits, cross-checks with soil temperature drift, logs to SD card, and triggers an audible and visual alarm when measured force approaches 90% of the design limit.
objective: Real-time safety monitoring with closed-loop fault annunciation and SD data logging for a retaining wall subject to saturated backfill loading.
constraints: Arduino Mega, four 50 kg load cells, HX711 modules, passive buzzer, SD module; wall height ≤ 3 m; 12 V DC supply; soil φ=30°, γ=18 kN/m³, c=5 kPa.
design_element_titles: Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller

element_usage_notes.HX711 Load Cell Amplifier Array: Primary sensing; four cells read sequentially, forces summed for total lateral load estimate.
element_usage_notes.Buzzer and LED Fault Annunciator: Alarm output; activates on force >90% of Rankine limit or sensor open-circuit fault.
element_usage_notes.Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controlle: Repurposed as rate-of-change guard: inner loop tracks load rate, outer loop tracks absolute load vs. 0.85×limit setpoint.
element_usage_notes.DS18B20 1-Wire Temperature Probe Array: Monitors soil/ambient temperature to apply zero-drift thermal compensation to load cell output.

element_interactions.to: Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller
element_interactions.description: Measured lateral force fed as outer-loop process variable.
Temperature reading used to apply zero-drift compensation to HX711 outputs.

element_interactions.from: Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller
element_interactions.description: PID outer-loop error exceeding threshold triggers annunciator.
